g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
639 Westmount Drive, a 12-unit multifamily property located in the
Westmount area of Strathmore, Alberta, sold on January 11, 2024, for
$2,050,000 ($170,833 per unit). The asset was acquired by Civitas Real Estate
(General Partner) Ltd. from Gary Kaechele in an arm’s-length, cash-to-seller
transaction. Constructed in 1973, the property consists of two, two-storey
apartment buildings, each containing six two-bedroom units. The complex is
situated on landscaped grounds with paved on-site parking. Each suite is
equipped with in-suite laundry. At the time of sale, the property generated a
reported net operating income of $123,488, representing a capitalization rate
of 6.02%. The asset had been listed for $2,100,000 and sold after 85 days on
the market. The legal description included units 1–6/8310874, with the sale
